title: Boat names fix
description: Place boats in the world without losing their names
body:
# Information
Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)\
This mod fixes bug MC-249408, MC-91006 - boats loses their display name when placed or broken.\
Mod espesially useful for resource packs that have custom boats/chest_boats models or texture based on their names
